title: An exciting trip
question: 把今天课文里「远方的人生更新」放进你自己的生活——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: 老师有个朋友第一次去国外工作。He has been there for two months, and this new life feels exciting.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 收到远方亲戚的新消息
options.english_template: I ___ a message from my cousin. He is studying in another city.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 姐姐已经在上海待了一段时间
options.english_template: My sister is in Shanghai. She ___ three months.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 朋友第一次出国，所以旅程让他很兴奋
options.english_template: My friend ___, so this trip feels very exciting to him.
